CREATE FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.example_filter(input clob) RETURNS clob AS 'return input;' LANGUAGE 'sql';
COMMENT ON FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.example_filter IS 'This function processes a clob input.';
COMMENT ON FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.example_filter IS NULL;
COMMENT ON FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.example_filter IS '';
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.complex_filter(input clob, pattern clob) RETURNS boolean AS 'return input ilike pattern;' LANGUAGE 'sql';
COMMENT ON FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.complex_filter IS 'This function checks if input matches the pattern with case insensitive.';
COMMENT ON FILTER FUNCTION sys."ilike"(clob, clob) IS 'case insensitive pattern matching';
COMMENT ON FILTER FUNCTION sys."ilike"(clob, clob, clob) IS 'case insensitive pattern matching with user specified escape character';
CREATE FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.combine_filter(a clob, b clob) RETURNS clob AS 'return a || b;' LANGUAGE 'sql';
COMMENT ON FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.combine_filter IS 'This function concatenates two clob inputs.';
CREATE TABLE test_table (col1 clob, col2 clob);
SELECT col1 FROM test_table WHERE test_schema.example_filter(col2) IS NOT NULL;
COMMENT ON FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.example_filter IS 'Updated comment for function.';
